name: I Can't Believe It's All Veggie Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Dried Basil, or 2 tbsp Fresh Basil
1 cup Okra, frozen or fresh, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Cover and cook until done, about 6 hours.
3. Serve as desired.
Serving size: 1 Cup
12 Servings: 120 Cal, 8.25 Prot, Chol 0, Carb 21.5, Sodium 255, Fiber 2, Fat .5, Iron 5, Calcium 65, % Cal from Prot: 27%, Carb: 71%, Fat: 2%
